name: Goa Beach Escape
highlights: Water sports package (jet ski, parasailing, banana boat)
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in a 3-star beach resort
AC vehicle for all transfers and sightseeing
exclusions: Any activity not mentioned in inclusions

itinerary.title: Arrival & Check-in
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Goa airport/station. Transfer to beach resort. Evening at leisure on the beach. Welcome dinner.

itinerary.title: North Goa Beach & Heritage
itinerary.activities: Morning water sports at Calangute/Baga Beach. Afternoon Old Goa church tour (Basilica of Bom Jesus, Se Cathedral). Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: South Goa Exploration
itinerary.activities: Visit Palolem Beach and Colva Beach. Explore spice plantation. Seafood lunch by the beach.

itinerary.title: Water Sports & Leisure
itinerary.activities: Full water sports package – jet ski, parasailing, banana boat ride. Afternoon free for shopping at Anjuna flea market.

itinerary.title: Sunset Cruise & Markets
itinerary.activities: Morning at leisure. Evening sunset dinner cruise on Mandovi River with live Goan folk music.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Breakfast and checkout. Transfer to airport/station.

reviews.author: Priya M.
reviews.comment: Absolutely magical! The beach resort was stunning and the water sports were a blast.

reviews.author: Ravi K.
reviews.comment: Great trip overall. The sunset cruise was the highlight. Food could be better.

reviews.author: Sunita R.
reviews.comment: Loved every moment. Royal Journeys took care of everything perfectly.

name: Manali Snow Adventure
highlights: Snow activities – skiing, snowboarding, snow trekking
inclusions: 6 nights accommodation in a boutique hotel/resort
AC vehicle for all transfers and sightseeing
Snow activity package at Solang Valley

itinerary.title: Arrival in Manali
itinerary.activities: Arrive and check in. Evening stroll on Mall Road. Welcome dinner and bonfire.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley Snow Point
itinerary.activities: Full day at Solang Valley. Skiing, snow tubing, snow trekking. Return by evening.

itinerary.title: Rohtang Pass
itinerary.activities: Early morning departure for Rohtang Pass (subject to permit availability). Snow activities, photography. Return by afternoon.

itinerary.title: Old Manali & Hadimba Temple
itinerary.activities: Visit Hadimba Devi Temple and Manu Temple. Explore Old Manali cafes and markets. Afternoon leisure.

itinerary.title: Kullu & Naggar Castle
itinerary.activities: Drive to Kullu valley. Visit Naggar Castle and Nicholas Roerich Art Gallery. Whitewater rafting option.

itinerary.title: Adventure Day
itinerary.activities: Choose from ziplining, quad biking, or a nature walk to Jogini Waterfall. Evening bonfire and cultural program.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Breakfast and checkout. Transfer to Bhuntar Airport or Manali bus stand.

reviews.author: Arjun S.
reviews.comment: Best honeymoon trip ever! Rohtang Pass in snow was breathtaking.

reviews.author: Nisha P.
reviews.comment: Amazing experience. Snow gear rental is expensive locally, wish it was included.

name: Kerala Backwaters & Beaches
highlights: Overnight houseboat stay in Alleppey backwaters
inclusions: Daily breakfast and dinner (all meals on houseboat)
AC vehicle for all transfers and sightseeing

itinerary.title: Arrive Cochin
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Cochin airport. Transfer to hotel. Evening Fort Kochi walk – Chinese fishing nets, spice market.

itinerary.title: Cochin Heritage & Kathakali
itinerary.activities: Mattancherry Palace and Jewish Synagogue. Evening Kathakali performance.

itinerary.title: Munnar Tea Gardens
itinerary.activities: Drive to Munnar through scenic tea estates. Visit tea factory. Evening walk in the hills.

itinerary.title: Munnar & Eravikulam
itinerary.activities: Eravikulam National Park (Nilgiri Tahr). Top Station viewpoint. Afternoon at leisure.

itinerary.title: Thekkady Wildlife
itinerary.activities: Drive to Thekkady. Periyar Lake boat cruise for wildlife spotting. Spice plantation tour.

itinerary.title: Alleppey Houseboat
itinerary.activities: Drive to Alleppey. Board traditional kettuvallam (houseboat). Cruise through backwaters. All meals on board.

itinerary.title: Kovalam Beach
itinerary.activities: Drive to Kovalam. Relax on lighthouse beach. Ayurvedic spa session. Seafood dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Breakfast and checkout. Transfer to Trivandrum airport.

reviews.author: Meera T.
reviews.comment: The houseboat night was pure magic. Kerala is stunning – will definitely come back.

reviews.author: Vikram L.
reviews.comment: Every detail was perfectly arranged. The Ayurvedic spa was deeply relaxing.

name: Royal Rajasthan Heritage
highlights: Amber Fort elephant / jeep ride in Jaipur
City Palace and Lake Pichola, Udaipur
Desert camel safari at Sam Sand Dunes
inclusions: AC vehicle for all transfers and sightseeing
Camel safari at Sam Sand Dunes (Jaisalmer day trip)

itinerary.title: Arrive Jaipur – Pink City
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Jaipur. Check in to heritage hotel. Evening at Chokhi Dhani for Rajasthani cultural dinner.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Forts & Palaces
itinerary.activities: Amber Fort (jeep ride). Nahargarh Fort. Hawa Mahal. City Palace and Jantar Mantar. Evening at Johari Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Outskirts
itinerary.activities: Abhaneri Step Well. Fatehpur Sikri (en route to Agra). Taj Mahal at sunset.

itinerary.title: Drive to Jodhpur – Blue City
itinerary.activities: Scenic drive via desert highway. Arrive Jodhpur. Evening stroll in old city bazaar.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur Heritage
itinerary.activities: Mehrangarh Fort (panoramic views). Jaswant Thada marble cenotaph. Clocktower spice market.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer – Golden City
itinerary.activities: Drive to Jaisalmer. Jaisalmer Fort. Patwon Ki Haveli. Evening camel safari at Sam Sand Dunes. Desert camp dinner.

itinerary.title: Drive to Udaipur – Lake City
itinerary.activities: Drive through Aravalli hills. Arrive Udaipur. Evening boat ride on Lake Pichola.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Palaces
itinerary.activities: City Palace museum. Jagdish Temple. Saheliyon ki Bari garden. Monsoon Palace sunset view.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Breakfast. Transfer to Udaipur airport or railway station.

reviews.author: Deepa N.
reviews.comment: A journey through time! The camel safari under stars was unforgettable.

reviews.author: Sanjay B.
reviews.comment: Magnificent forts and palaces. Royal Journeys arranged everything seamlessly.

reviews.author: Kavita H.
reviews.comment: Udaipur is a dream. Heritage hotel stay was the cherry on top!

name: Andaman Island Paradise
inclusions: 6 nights accommodation (2 nights Havelock beach resort)
Cellular Jail entry + light & sound show

itinerary.title: Arrive Port Blair
itinerary.activities: Arrive at Veer Savarkar Airport. Transfer to hotel. Evening visit to Corbyn's Cove Beach.

itinerary.title: Port Blair Heritage
itinerary.activities: Cellular Jail tour. Ross Island – ruins of British headquarters. North Bay Island – snorkeling and glass-bottom boat.

itinerary.title: Havelock Island
itinerary.activities: Morning ferry to Havelock. Check in at beach resort. Afternoon at Radhanagar Beach (Asia's No. 1 beach).

itinerary.title: Elephant Beach Adventures
itinerary.activities: Boat to Elephant Beach. Snorkeling in crystal-clear waters. Sea walking (no prior experience needed). Afternoon at leisure.

itinerary.title: Leisure & Scuba (Optional)
itinerary.activities: Free day at Havelock. Optional scuba diving at Neil's Cove reef. Sunset beach walk.

itinerary.title: Neil Island & Return
itinerary.activities: Day trip to Neil Island – Natural Bridge, Bharatpur Beach. Return ferry to Port Blair. Farewell seafood dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.activities: Breakfast and checkout. Transfer to airport.

reviews.author: Rahul G.
reviews.comment: Havelock Island is paradise on earth. Sea walking was an experience of a lifetime!

reviews.author: Anjali S.
reviews.comment: Our honeymoon was perfect. Radhanagar Beach at sunset – words can't describe it.
